title: Island Bank
description: Shared island bank account for team members. Deposit, withdraw, and manage island finances together.
body: # 🏦 Island Bank — Shared Team Finances Adds a shared bank account to each island. Team members can deposit and withdraw money, making it easy to pool resources for upgrades, challenges, and purchases. ## Features - **Shared balance** — all team members access the same island bank - **Deposit & withdraw** — simple commands for money management - **Transaction history** — track who deposited and withdrew - **Configurable** — set interest rates, maximum balance, and tax on transactions - **Works with Vault-compatible economy plugins** - **Works with all BentoBox game modes** 📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon + a Vault economy plugin.
